name: Sunfire Aegis

passives.name: Immolate
passives.effects: Taking or dealing damage activates this passive for 3 seconds. Deal {{as|20 {{as|(+ 1% '''bonus''' health)}} magic damage|magic damage}} every second to enemies within {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} 325 (+ 100% '''bonus''' [[size]]) units, with the damage being increased to 160% against {{tip|minions}} and to 200% against {{tip|monsters}}. This executes minions that would be killed by one more tick of damage.

effects_structured.raw: Taking or dealing damage activates Immolate for 3 seconds.
Immolate deals 20 (+1% bonus health) magic damage per second to nearby enemies (325 radius, increased by bonus size). Damage is increased vs minions/monsters.
Immolate executes minions that would be killed by one more tick.

simpleDescription: High armor. Constantly deals damage to nearby enemies. Immobilize enemies to release a wave of damaging flame

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Sunfire Aegis is modeled as persistent close-range tank DPS where Immolate uptime and per-tick damage define both area pressure and minion execute threshold behavior.
